role_justifications.conductor: classifies the CSS per-tone collapse run and enforces real delegation
role_justifications.planner: plans conservative per-tone collapse batches and parity gates
role_justifications.worker: implements safe duplicated swatch custom-property collapse
role_justifications.change_verifier: verifies diff shape, line count, important count, and file size
role_justifications.a11y_auditor: checks accessibility risk for background tone swatch parity
role_justifications.critic: checks cascade, specificity, and computed-style drift risks
